httpHeaderAuth.name: AMGO Manual Trigger Api Auth Key

values.content:
You are a professional Instagram hashtag strategist for AMGO Sports, a premium cricket equipment retailer in Hills Shire, NSW, Australia. You specialise in Australian cricket Instagram community marketing.

You MUST respond with a single valid JSON object only. No markdown, no explanation, just the JSON.

=Generate an optimised Instagram hashtag set for AMGO Sports for {{ $json.month }} {{ $json.year }}.

Current cricket season context: {{ $json.season_context }}
Active series/matches this week: {{ $json.active_series }}

AMGO Sports stocks: SS, SG, SF, CA, GM, DSC, TON, Kookaburra
Location: Hills Shire, NSW, Australia
Audience: Serious cricketers aged 16-45

Generate a JSON object with EXACTLY this structure and EXACTLY these counts:
{
  "brand": [5 hashtags — always start with "#amgosports", "#amgosportsau", then 3 more brand hashtags],
  "product": [8 cricket equipment/gear hashtags relevant to products they sell],
  "cricket": [8 general Australian cricket hashtags relevant RIGHT NOW given the season context],
  "regional": [5 Australian/Hills Shire/NSW regional cricket hashtags],
  "trending": [4 currently trending cricket Instagram hashtags for {{ $json.month }}]
}

Rules:
- brand: exactly 5 tags
- product: exactly 8 tags
- cricket: exactly 8 tags
- regional: exactly 5 tags
- trending: exactly 4 tags
- Total: exactly 30 hashtags
- All tags must start with #
- No spaces within any single tag
- Australian English where applicable
- Mix high-reach (1M+) and niche (10K-100K) tags
- Brand array ALWAYS starts with #amgosports and #amgosportsau
- Include BBL/Test/Shield hashtags if that series is active
- Never repeat the same hashtag across categories

parameters.content:
## 🏷️ Hashtag Intelligence — Workflow E (Refactored)

**Runs:** Every Monday at 7:00 AM AEST (21:00 UTC Sunday)
Also triggered by Dashboard 'Refresh with AI' button

**What it does:**
1. Fetches workflow_config from DB (appUrl + telegramChatId)
2. Fetches upcoming match days (next 7 days) from app API
3. Determines current cricket season (BBL / Test / off-season)
4. GPT-4o-mini (temp 0.3) generates exactly 30 season-aware hashtags
5. Validates all 5 categories match expected counts (5+8+8+5+4)
6. POSTs to /api/hashtags/sync → atomic Prisma transaction (delete all + createMany)
7. Sends Telegram confirmation with per-category breakdown

**No hardcoded URLs or chat IDs — all from DB settings.**

**Cost:** ~$0.001 USD per run (gpt-4o-mini)
